title: Gish(Pack)
body:
A Modpack that will make your multiplayer experience better in all! It gets updates regularly about every week or so.

Gish(Pack) adds a ton of mods to the mix with new versions coming out frequently. This Modpack improves the fun on Multiplayer servers and Singleplayer in general. We plan to add A LOT to this Modpack over the time we are working on it. This Modpack will be continued for a while and it is EXCLUSIVE to 1.20.1 but i may add some versions that can be used on earlier or later versions.

This is a Vanilla+ Modpack if you use version 0.0.1, etc since version 0.0.1 is just a version with some optimization mods. This Modpack is evolving over time and can be played Singleplayer! Keep track of updates of this Modpack if you want to keep your multiplayer Minecraft experience fresh!

I am working on this Modpack with some friends however I am the only one with a Modrinth account so they just give me mod suggestions and we have a vote on them to decide if we want it in the Modpack. If we add a game changing mod to the mix I will make a new versions that EXCLUDE the game changing mods so EVERYONE can play it if they don't want the orignal Minecraft experience to be changed drastically.

This Modpack just improves Minecraft in all and makes it a better experience for Multiplayer and Singleplayer, it gets more and more improved and makes your experience playing Gish(Pack) better the more updates we add. We also have a Discord Server if you want to know when updates are released and you can vote on the mods we suggest to be added in the Modpack.

Some mods that will enhance your experience are: Iris Shaders alongside Sodium bringing high fps with stunning graphics and we have Lithium and LambDynamicLights making it so you can see in the dark and you get stunning server performance. These are only some of the mods that are in this Modpack all of which are there to enhance your experience in Gish(Pack).

**This is entirely a 1.20.1 Modpack and some of the mods in here are going to be pretty resource intensive so makes sure you know what version of the mod your downloading is. (We will mark versions of the mod if they are performance heavy or not.)**

you know what that means FISH
